message:
test(oracle): add 21 conformance tests (s267-s287) covering joins, aggregates, CTEs, views, triggers

LEFT JOIN null propagation, self-joins, aggregate on empty table,
recursive CTE fibonacci, correlated subquery in SELECT list,
HAVING without GROUP BY, DISTINCT + ORDER BY, multi-column GROUP BY,
default rowid, LIKE patterns, expression-only SELECTs, multiple indexes,
trigger side effects, savepoints, FK cascade, complex CTEs, UPDATE CASE,
NULL handling edges, view queries, multi-table join filters, integer overflow.

701 pass, 0 fail, 8 ignored.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
